source_rationale: PPARG is the master transcription factor for adipogenesis and a definitive marker of adipocytes.

Core adipocyte markers (PPARG, ADIPOQ, LEP, PLIN1, FASN, SREBF1, CIDEA, LIPE, PNPLA2) along with lipid metabolism genes (DGAT1, DGAT2, ELOVL5) and insulin signaling (INSR, IRS1, IRS2) define mature white adipocytes. FOS/JUN suggest transcriptional activity.
